title: E-R-AUDIT: Audit and catalog all ~200 operations across 26 domains from OPERATIONS registry
acceptance: Produce complete inventory of all operations with domain, gateway, params, return type, idempotency, tier, session requirement
Flag operations with missing/incorrect param definitions and no gate definitions
Output Markdown catalog at docs/research/T10400-operations-catalog.md

Covers all 26 domains: tasks, orchestrate, focus, docs, session, memory, brain, daemon, doctor, release, agents, nexus, conduit, dialectic, intelligence, issues, lifecycle, llm, pipeline, playbook, research, sentient, skills, sticky, system, validate, worktree

title: E-R-ENVELOPE-SSOT: Formalize LAFS envelope as canonical SDK boundary from T10343 doctrine
acceptance: Derive canonical LAFS envelope shape from T10343 envelope-first doctrine
Document required fields, optional fields, extension points, pagination modes, error categories, agent actions, retry semantics
Document MVI projection levels and transport bindings (HTTP status codes, CLI exit codes)
Output spec at docs/specs/T10400-lafs-envelope-ssot.md

title: E-R-ERROR-REGISTRY: Audit error code registry and fill gaps for all 10 LAFS error categories
acceptance: Audit packages/lafs/src/errorRegistry.ts for completeness across all 10 categories
Cross-reference with STATIC_GATE_TABLE and core error usage to identify gaps
Produce complete error code catalog with code, category, retryable, retryAfterMs, agentAction, docUrl
Output at docs/specs/T10400-error-code-registry.md

title: E-S-OPENAPI: Author OpenAPI 3.2 specification from audited operations catalog
acceptance: Produce docs/api/cleo-sdk-api.openapi.yaml with all domains as tagged path groups
Common schema components: LAFSEnvelope, LAFSMeta, LAFSError, LAFSPage, Warning, MVILevel
Every operation from audit catalog has a path entry with params, requestBody, responses
HTTP status code mapping complete; pagination supported via query params
Spec passes openapi-cli lint validation

title: E-S-AUTH: Design auth surface for SDK API access
acceptance: Document machine-local Unix-socket trust model (default, no auth within ~/.local/share/cleo/)
Document optional token auth for remote/network exposure via Gateway
Specify token storage (encrypted) and JWT Proxy-Authorization header per T10409 AC7
Define auth error responses (401, 403) in OpenAPI spec format

title: E-S-VERSIONING: Define SDK versioning policy and deprecation lifecycle
acceptance: Document semver policy: MAJOR for envelope shape change, MINOR for new ops, PATCH for fixes
Define deprecation lifecycle: @deprecated JSDoc -> W_DEPRECATED warning -> removal after 2 minor versions
Document cleo doctor api command surfacing deprecation registry
Output VERSIONING.md in SDK package

title: E-I-SDK-SCAFFOLD: Create @cleocode/cleo-sdk package with transport-agnostic client
acceptance: New package at packages/cleo-sdk/ with package.json (@cleocode/cleo-sdk v0.1.0), tsconfig, build config
Transport interface: execute<T>(operation, params) returning Promise<LAFSEnvelope<T>>
InProcessTransport wrapping @cleocode/core dispatch; HttpTransport stub for T10401
CleoSdkClient class accepting transport; builds with tsc; exports CJS+ESM
README with basic usage example

title: E-I-CI-GATE: Implement lint-envelope-compliance.mjs CI gate
acceptance: Script at scripts/lint-envelope-compliance.mjs validating LAFSEnvelope against OpenAPI spec
Checks: $schema, _meta required fields, success, result/error exclusion, error categories, agent actions
Baseline=0 strict mode; CI integration on every PR touching packages/cleo-sdk/ or packages/core/
Human-readable violation report with file:line references
